violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Staff completing course today, exam to be scheduled. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on unit #73 were observed in poor repair, held with tape. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Staff member is enrolled in class currently. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Sliced turkey and tuna salad were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in refrigerator #73. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on #73 were observed in poor repair, held with tape. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The following were observed not in good repair: -gaskets on 4-dr refrigerator -2-dr low boy (work order in place). New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice box -prep lids under the ticket holders. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, sandwich omelets were stacked and placed hot in the prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep. Staff placed eggs on a sheet pan to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the 4-door reach in were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The condensate/drain line from the temporary rainwater leak containment is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
